text:
A TNC shall maintain the following records:

(1) individual trip records for at least six years from the date each trip was provided; and

(2) individual records of TNC drivers at least until the six year anniversary of the date on which a TNC driver’s relationship with the TNC has ended.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 8
#### Article 44
##### § 1697 — Maintenance of records

A TNC shall maintain the following records:

(1) individual trip records for at least six years from the date each trip was provided; and

(2) individual records of TNC drivers at least until the six year anniversary of the date on which a TNC driver’s relationship with the TNC has ended.

*Last modified: Jun. 30, 2017*

subsections.text: A TNC shall maintain the following records:
individual trip records for at least six years from the date each trip was provided; and
individual records of TNC drivers at least until the six year anniversary of the date on which a TNC driver’s relationship with the TNC has ended.
